title: ADL Agent Discovery Document
description: The discovery document served at https://{domain}/.well-known/adl-agents, listing the ADL agents a domain publishes (ADL Core §6.4). Verified independently of any single ADL document.

adl_discovery.description: Discovery document format version. MUST be "1.0" for this specification.

agents.description: The agents published by this domain.

adl_document.description: URL to the full ADL document.

description.description: Concise, capability-focused summary for triage (RECOMMENDED). MUST NOT exceed 256 characters.

keywords.description: Short strings naming the agent's domains, tasks, or capabilities, for programmatic matching.
